We use Copilot!


1. Gym - Nutrition - Macro application
2. The language is React-Native with Typescript.
3.  The framework is Expo.
4. We must be consist and check what we have implemented.
5. Each page must have a seperate folder.
6. Each page must be added in the projects: README.md file.
7. Each page must have a seperate component.
8. Styles must be consistent.
9. Use the color palette.
10. Sizes for the inputs will be small, large, xlarge.
11. All styles must have the same name with the component and be in the same folder as the component.
12. Each call in the database must be in a function in a seperate file and be called in the component.
